name: Leeladhar
meaning: Bearer of divine play, Lord Krishna

name: Leelavathi
meaning: Full of divine play and grace

name: Aarushi
meaning: First rays of the sun, dawn

name: Agastya
meaning: Name of a great sage, mountain mover

name: Anasuya
meaning: Without envy, wife of sage Atri

name: Ashita
meaning: River Yamuna, one who brings peace

name: Indrani
meaning: Wife of Indra, queen of gods

name: Varun
meaning: God of water and sky, ocean lord

name: Vivekanand
meaning: Joy of wisdom, after Swami Vivekananda

name: Karthika
meaning: Name of a star, daughter of Pleiades

name: Kousik
meaning: Name of a sage, wise one

name: Dilip
meaning: Protector of Delhi, a great king

name: Mukesh
meaning: Lord of the dumb, Lord Vishnu

name: Muruga
meaning: Lord Murugan, young god of war

name: Parvati
meaning: Daughter of the mountain, Shiva's wife

name: Yashodhara
meaning: Bearer of fame, wife of Buddha

name: Jaideep
meaning: Victory of light, lamp of victory

name: Atharv
meaning: One who knows the meaning of Atharva Veda

name: Nagabhushanam
meaning: One who wears serpent as ornament, Shiva

name: Rajendra
meaning: King of kings, lord of kings
